package rulecoverage

func PositiveAppendThenTrimEachIteration() string {
    ruleID := "append_then_trim_each_iteration"
    family := "hot_path"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Slice append followed by reslice each iteration instead of batching."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
